intro: Pararistolochia decandra, also known as Kuding, is a type of flowering plant in the Aristolochiaceae family, native to China and other parts of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, and its health benefits include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and anti-cancer properties, as well as the ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels.
